steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “the second most commonly used password” signals that the blank should describe something widely adopted by many users.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Popular directly answers why such a convenience-focused approach would be widespread — because many people choose it.

The other three fail because creative contradicts the simplicity of the example, useful doesn't explain the widespread adoption, and complex reverses the meaning.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
